# Nanhu Interactive | Premium iOS App Acquisitions Studio

> Vetted proprietary native iOS codebases and software assets ready for immediate developer transfer.

Nanhu Interactive builds, audits, and transitions premium, native iOS mobile applications. All properties feature 100% clean Swift/SwiftUI architectures, pre-configured StoreKit 2 paywalls, full test suites, and zero technical debt.

## Founder & Lead iOS Architect

Nitin Kumar is the founder and lead systems architect of Nanhu Interactive. He is an award-winning mobile systems engineer and Apple Swift Student Challenge Winner (2026). Nitin Kumar designs, audits, and maintains all native iOS codebase assets in the Nanhu portfolio.

## Key Studio Metrics & Quality Standards

- **Core Languages**: 100% native Swift and SwiftUI layouts.
- **Quality**: 90%+ code coverage (comprehensive XCTest suites).
- **Compliance**: Bi-directional Apple HealthKit sync, CoreMotion activity classification, AVFoundation speech-to-text autoscroll, and local SwiftData cache targets.
- **Handover Protocol**: Escrow.com secured transactions with 7-day inspection windows, 30 days of direct technical support, and instant App Store Connect handover.
- **Contact Inquiry**: acquisitions@nanhu.studio / nanhuinteractive@gmail.com.

## Software Assets Catalog

- **QR Maker**: Dynamic QR code generator utility and widget. SwiftUI, SwiftData, CoreImage, StoreKit 2, WidgetKit. Pre-configured StoreKit paywalls. Live on App Store. Link: https://nanhuinteractive.dev/apps/qr-maker (App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/qr-maker/id6775972421)
- **Fit60**: 60-day workout challenge companion and tracker. SwiftUI, SwiftData, HealthKit, StoreKit 2, CoreMotion. Live on App Store. Link: https://nanhuinteractive.dev/apps/fit60 (App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/fit60/id6786881668)
- **NanhuFX**: Speech-recognition voice-synced video teleprompter. SwiftUI, SwiftData, Speech Recognition, AVFoundation, iCloud, StoreKit 2. Link: https://nanhuinteractive.dev/apps/nanhufx (App Store: Coming soon)
- **Runlit**: Premium iOS & watchOS GPS Run Tracker & Streak Guardian. Next-generation tracking HUD. SwiftUI, watchOS, CoreMotion, CoreLocation, SwiftData, ActivityKit (Live Activities), StoreKit 2. Link: https://nanhuinteractive.dev/apps/runlit (App Store: Coming soon)

## Programmatic SEO & Intent Landing Pages

Explore dedicated reports on iOS architectures, acquisitions, and compliance standards:
- **Native iOS Apps for Sale | Premium Swift Codebases**: Explore premium, native iOS apps for sale. 100% native Swift/SwiftUI codebases with clean architectures, zero technical debt, and instant transfer. Link: https://nanhuinteractive.dev/native-ios-apps
- **SwiftUI App Source Code | Declarative iOS Codebases**: Buy production-ready SwiftUI app source code. Explore clean SwiftUI layouts, modern state management, and reusable modular UI components. Link: https://nanhuinteractive.dev/swiftui-apps
- **CloudKit Apps for Sale | Serverless iOS Database Sync**: Acquire premium iOS apps utilizing CloudKit for serverless database sync. Secure private iCloud user storage and global data sharing options. Link: https://nanhuinteractive.dev/cloudkit-apps
- **StoreKit 2 Apps for Sale | iOS In-App Purchase Codebases**: Buy ready-to-monetize StoreKit 2 apps. Pre-configured auto-renewable subscription paywalls, secure JWS transaction verification, and StoreKit files. Link: https://nanhuinteractive.dev/storekit-apps
- **Apple Wallet Apps for Sale | Custom Pass Integration**: Buy iOS apps with Apple Wallet integration. Generate, sign, and distribute custom pkpass event tickets, coupons, and loyalty cards. Link: https://nanhuinteractive.dev/apple-wallet-apps
- **iOS Apps for Sale | Premium Mobile Software Acquisitions**: Discover verified iOS apps for sale. Zero technical debt, complete Swift repositories, and transparent handover protocols. Link: https://nanhuinteractive.dev/ios-apps-for-sale
- **Buy iOS App Assets | Codebase Due Diligence Guide**: Vetted guide to buy iOS app assets. Learn how to verify revenue, audit Swift architectures, and ensure secure App Store Connect transfers. Link: https://nanhuinteractive.dev/buy-ios-app
- **iOS Source Code for Sale | Clean Swift Architectures**: Browse premium iOS source code for sale. Vetted repositories featuring modern SwiftData caches, watchOS targets, and complete test suites. Link: https://nanhuinteractive.dev/ios-source-code
- **Acquire iOS App Codebases | Secure Software Transition**: Acquire native iOS app codebases securely. Escrow.com secured transactions, NDA access protocols, and App Store Connect transfer support. Link: https://nanhuinteractive.dev/acquire-ios-app
- **Swift Development Standards | Premium Code Quality**: Discover our Swift development standards. Native SwiftUI architecture, Swift Concurrency, and Xcode Cloud CI/CD guidelines. Link: https://nanhuinteractive.dev/swift-development
- **HealthKit Fitness App Source Code | Buy iOS Wellness Apps**: Acquire premium HealthKit fitness apps. Native HealthKit telemetry integration, step counters, active calories, and secure user wellness data stores. Link: https://nanhuinteractive.dev/healthkit-apps
- **WidgetKit Home Screen Widgets | Premium iOS App Codebases**: Acquire iOS apps with native WidgetKit widget support. Responsive custom Lock Screen and Home Screen widgets synced via SwiftData adapters. Link: https://nanhuinteractive.dev/widgetkit-apps
- **watchOS Companion Apps for Sale | Premium Apple Watch Code**: Acquire premium watchOS companion apps for sale. Native standalone Apple Watch tracking architectures, workout sensors, and real-time complications. Link: https://nanhuinteractive.dev/watchos-apps
- **Speech Recognition iOS Apps | Buy Voice Teleprompter Code**: Acquire iOS voice and speech recognition apps. Native Apple Speech framework integrations, real-time audio transcriptions, and transcription pipelines. Link: https://nanhuinteractive.dev/speech-recognition-apps
- **QR Code Generator iOS App Source Code | Custom Widgets**: Buy QR code scanner and generator iOS apps. Advanced CoreImage filter integrations, customizable vector color grids, and WidgetKit extensions. Link: https://nanhuinteractive.dev/qr-code-apps
- **Premium iOS App Templates | SwiftUI Starter Source Code**: Buy high-quality, professional SwiftUI app templates. Standard boilerplate packages featuring StoreKit 2 paywalls, SwiftData adapters, and clean MVVM. Link: https://nanhuinteractive.dev/ios-app-templates
- **Buy Production-Ready iOS Apps | Vetted Codebase Assets**: Explore verified, production-ready iOS apps for sale. Pre-tested, optimized app store builds with active revenue metrics and transparent handovers. Link: https://nanhuinteractive.dev/buy-production-ready-apps
- **iOS Acquisition Portfolio | Vetted Swift Applications**: Browse our complete iOS app acquisition portfolio. Premium, clean-architecture codebases designed by award-winning mobile systems engineers. Link: https://nanhuinteractive.dev/ios-developer-portfolio
- **iOS Micro-SaaS Apps for Sale | Premium Mobile Cash Flows**: Acquire premium iOS micro-SaaS apps. High-margin subscription models, pre-integrated analytics, and low-maintenance serverless databases. Link: https://nanhuinteractive.dev/micro-saas-apps
- **AVFoundation Media iOS Apps | Buy Camera & Audio Code**: Acquire iOS apps with AVFoundation media support. Custom camera capturing views, audio monitoring mixers, and optimized video export presets. Link: https://nanhuinteractive.dev/avfoundation-apps

- **Xcode Scheme Configurations Best Practices** [undefined]: Professional technical analysis and integration architecture blueprints for xcode scheme configurations best practices in enterprise iOS applications. Link: https://nanhuinteractive.dev/blog/xcode-scheme-configurations-best-practices

- **Acquisition ROI**: Build vs. Buy comparison data calculator for private equity and SaaS portfolios. Link: https://nanhuinteractive.dev/acquire
- **Refinery Log**: Deep technical write-ups and system migration case studies. Link: https://nanhuinteractive.dev/blog
- **Contact Inquiry**: Connect directly with our lead transition engineer. Link: https://nanhuinteractive.dev/contact
